description: MCP server configuration for the Agentic ALZ Accelerator. Aligned with APEX patterns: azure-pricing-mcp (submodule) + azure-platform (consolidated) + drawio-mcp-server.

azure-pricing.name: Azure Pricing MCP Server
azure-pricing.description: Real-time Azure pricing: 18 tools covering price search, cost estimation, RI analysis, spot VM intelligence, orphaned resources, Databricks DBU, and GitHub pricing. Upstream: msftnadavbh/AzurePricingMCP.

tools.name: azure_price_search
tools.description: Search Azure retail prices with flexible filters

tools.name: azure_price_compare
tools.description: Compare costs across regions or SKUs

tools.name: azure_ri_pricing
tools.description: Reserved Instance pricing with break-even analysis

tools.name: azure_region_recommend
tools.description: Find the cheapest regions for any SKU

tools.name: find_orphaned_resources
tools.description: Detect orphaned resources with cost analysis

tools.name: azure_ptu_sizing
tools.description: Estimate PTUs for Azure OpenAI deployments

azure-platform.name: Azure Platform MCP Server
azure-platform.description: Consolidated server for Azure platform operations: Resource Graph, Policy, Monitor, Deployment, and WARA Assessment. 27 tools via the official MCP Python SDK.

tools.name: query_resources
tools.description: Execute an Azure Resource Graph KQL query

tools.name: get_resource_inventory
tools.description: Get resource inventory summary by type

tools.name: get_resource_details
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a resource

tools.name: validate_landing_zone
tools.description: Validate key landing zone resources exist

tools.name: detect_drift
tools.description: Detect configuration drift via change tracking

tools.name: discover_policies
tools.description: Discover Azure Policy assignments at a scope

tools.name: get_compliance_state
tools.description: Get compliance summary for a scope

tools.name: generate_governance_constraints
tools.description: Produce governance constraints JSON for IaC planning

tools.name: get_secure_score
tools.description: Get Defender for Cloud secure score

tools.name: query_activity_log
tools.description: Query activity log for manual changes

tools.name: check_diagnostic_settings
tools.description: Verify diagnostic settings on key resources

tools.name: discover_environment
tools.description: Discover existing Azure environment for brownfield assessment

tools.name: get_discovery_summary
tools.description: Get summary of discovered environment resources

tools.name: run_wara_assessment
tools.description: Run WAF Reliability Assessment against discovered environment

tools.name: generate_assessment_reports
tools.description: Generate assessment report artifacts from discovery and WARA results

tools.name: list_wara_checks
tools.description: List available WARA check catalog entries

drawio.name: Draw.io MCP Server
drawio.description: Diagram generation with 700+ Azure icons, batch operations, groups, layers, and pages. Deno/TypeScript. Fork of simonkurtz-MSFT/drawio-mcp-server.
